name: Curare
description:
Activate 2 Interact

Hunters all over Golarion favor curare, a potent paralytic derived from boiled tree bark.

Saving Throw

Maximum Duration 6 rounds (but see stage 3)

Stage 1 ] damage, Clumsy 1, and Enfeebled 1 (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage, Clumsy 2, Enfeebled 2, and Slowed 1 (1 minute)

Stage 3 ] damage, clumsy 2, enfeebled 2, and slowed 1 (1 round). If the victim fails the saving throw while at stage 3, the poison ends and the victim is for [[/br 2d6 #Minutes]]{2d6 minutes}.
